section_title: Application of section 294 to a creditors vointary winding up.-- The provisions of section 294 shall apply the case
content:
303. Application of section 294 to a creditors vointary winding up.-- The provisions of section 294 shall apply the case
of a creditors voluntary winding up as in the he case of a members voluntary winding up with the modification that the
powers of the liquidator under the said section shall not be exercise with the saction either the of Court or of the committee
of inspection.
